item.title: Anna Dixon MP welcomes news thousands of unpaid carers are set to have debts cut or cancelled
item.description: Anna Dixon MP has today strongly welcomed the news that tens of thousands of unpaid carers affected by confusing guidance on their earnings are set to have their debts reduced, cancelled, or refunded, as part of a major reassessment of cases launched by the government.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Clean river campaigners and Anna Dixon continue campaign against local river pollution in Parliament
item.description: Members of the Ilkley Clean River Group and Shipley MP Anna Dixon joined forces again in Parliament on Tuesday to continue their campaign for large-scale reform of the water industry.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Anna Dixon MP announces upgrades to Windhill play park
item.description: Anna Dixon MP for Shipley, has today announced that she will be working closely with Bradford Council leaders to deliver much-needed improvements to a Windhill play park.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Key Energy Minister visits Saltaire to see innovative local listed homes upgrade project
item.description: A key government energy minister visited the Saltaire World Heritage Site on Thursday to meet with residents and learn how local organisations are retrofitting listed homes to enhance their energy efficiency.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Shipley MP continues campaign for electoral reform
item.description: Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today continued her long-standing campaign for reform of the UKs electoral system, sighting the strong public support for proportional representation in Parliament.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Anna Dixon MP champions Bradford’s young construction talent in Parliament following Airedale Hospital visit
item.description: Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today highlighted the achievements of Bradford’s young people and the importance of vocational education in the House of Commons during Prime Minister’s Questions.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Shipley MP Demands Action to Clean Up Local Rivers and Protect Billpayers
item.description: Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today continued her campaign for urgent reform of the water industry, citing in Parliament “years” of pollution, under‑investment and rising bills that have hit her constituents.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Local MP Calls for Tougher Action on Dangerous Driving as She Shares Personal Family Tragedy
item.description: Shipley MP Anna Dixon has today urged the Government to take bold action to tackle dangerous driving, drawing on her own family’s experience of losing a loved one in a fatal road collision.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Anna Dixon MP speaks in debate on Civil Service Pension Scheme
item.description: Anna Dixon MP for Shipley has today called on the government to explain what urgent action it is taking to rectify issues her constituents are facing with the Civil Service Pension Scheme.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Shipley MP Calls for Action to Make Bradford’s Parks and Streets Safer for Women and Girls
item.description: Shipley MP Anna Dixon has urged the government this week to increase support for local initiatives addressing violence against women and girls, highlighting new research indicating that nearly half of women surveyed in Myrtle Park, Bingley, do not feel safe after dark.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: “A Victory” for local leaseholders, Shipley MP Welcomes Government Move to Cap Ground Rents at £250
item.description: Shipley MP Anna Dixon, has today welcomed the Government’s announcement that ground rents paid by leaseholders will be capped at £250 per year, describing the move as “a long‑overdue step towards fairness for thousands trapped in an unfair system.”
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Anna Dixon MP urges Grooming Gangs Inquiry Chair to “Listen to victims and survivors” in Bradford
item.description: Anna Dixon MP has today called on the Chair of the new National Inquiry into Grooming Gangs to “come to Bradford and listen to victims and survivors”.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: "Catastrophic humanitarian disaster" unfolding in Gaza, says Anna Dixon MP
item.description: Anna Dixon MP has today described the current situation in Gaza as a humanitarian disaster, and asked the government what steps it is taking to ensure international non-governmental organisations can continue to operate in the region.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Anna Dixon calls for stricter regulation of fireworks
item.description: Anna Dixon MP for Shipley has today called on the government to bring in stricter measures to crackdown on the illegal use of fireworks in her constituency.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Local charity and MP bring key Shipley businesses together
item.description: A Shipley-based charity on Friday teamed up with the town’s local MP to bring together independent business leaders from across the town to promote available funding grants and explain how they can support local fundraising efforts.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Shipley MP calls for clearer welfare labelling on animal products
item.description: Anna Dixon MP for Shipley has today called on the Government that labelling related to welfare on animal products is made clearer.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Anna Dixon MP calls for greater support for tenant diary farmers
item.description: Anna Dixon MP for Shipley has today called on the Labour Government to set out how it intends to implement the recommendations of Baroness Rock’s review and help tenant dairy farmers.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: “Listen to the victims and survivors in Bradford” Shipley MP says to new grooming gangs inquiry chair
item.description: Shipley MP Anna Dixon has called on the newly appointed chair of the inquiry into child sexual abuse by grooming gangs to come to Bradford and “listen to the victims and survivors”.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Shipley MP hails scrapping of two-child benefit cap
item.description: Shipley MP Anna Dixon has praised the Labour Government’s decision to scrap the two-child benefit cap in today’s Budget statement.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001

item.title: Shipley MP backs community ownership for Bingley Pool Building
item.description: Anna Dixon MP for Shipley has today stated her support for the local community to take ownership of the Bingley Pool building in her constituency.
item.dc:creator: jamieparkinson2001
